content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.23% with mixed sector action — Realty (+2.06%) and Pharma (+0.62%) leading, IT (-1.23%) lagging. India VIX at 18.68 (+1.19%) signals elevated risk; intraday tape shows a sell-into-strength pattern with most leaders fading from morning highs. Book is already 52% deployed across 10 names; focus is position management not new exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +5.9% with strong Q4 thesis intact (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%, Goldman/MS upgrades). Stock fading from 1057 high to 1040 — trail SL from 1025 to 1028 (locks in ~4.5% gain, sits 1.2% below CMP, comfortable above intraday low 1039.50). Target 1110 retained — still ~6.5% upside. Trail-gap 1.2% respects the 0.5% min gap rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "-2.3% unrealized, CMP 122.23 vs SL 119 (2.6% buffer). MACD bearish crossover near-term but structural gold thesis intact (CB buying, geopolitical premium, weak USD). SL holds at 119 — no tightening warranted given mean-reversion potential. Macro hedge role intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.4% unrealized, CMP 24.01 vs stored SL 23.85 (only 0.7% buffer — very tight already). No room to trail higher without flush-to-CMP risk. Pharma sector defensive bid intact but tariff overhang persists. Stored SL adequate; HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.74,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Excellent intraday strength: +3.93%, broke above 52w high to 1748.60, FY26 record print confirmed (PAT +16%, revenue +25%, 500+ MMT cargo), Jefferies/MOFSL bullish. Position +1.9% but with new ATH break. Trail SL 1710 → 1715 (locks in ~0.9% gain, sits 0.65% below CMP 1726.40 — within trail-gap discipline). Target 1790 retained — MOFSL Rs 1900 supports further upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7%, CMP 1530.70 vs SL 1510 (1.4% buffer). Today gapped up to 1600 (52w high) then sold off hard to 1524 on 4.2x volume — distribution day signature. BUT Q4 board meeting May 14 is a binary catalyst within reach. Per binary-event discipline, position is already small/near-flat — SL at 1510 is tight enough (1.4%) that catastrophic tail is capped. Holding into Q3 strength + dividend optionality. If breaks 1510, exits cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-2.6% unrealized, CMP 13463 vs SL 13400 (only 0.5% buffer remaining). Stock gapped up to 13976 on record April sales then sold off all day — bearish reversal pattern. Q4 net profit declined 6.45% YoY is the persisting drag. Cannot tighten SL further (already at 0.5% buffer = at trail-gap floor). HOLD with current SL doing the work — if 13400 breaks, exit is automatic."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.4%, CMP 205.65 vs SL 204 (0.8% buffer). Hit 52w high 212.66 today on West Bengal election catalyst then faded. Q4 PAT +69%, GNPA improvement to 3.27% — thesis intact. Stored SL 204 sits below today's low 201.30 acting as structural support. HOLD; cannot trail without breaching trail-gap discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, CMP 4540.60 vs SL 4480 (1.3% buffer). Stock surged to 4590 intraday on F414 JV/CMD news, faded modestly. Defence cycle and Citi Rs 5560 target intact. SL gives appropriate room for normal volatility. HOLD; no tightening — too early in trade."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, CMP 507.05 vs SL 500 (1.4% buffer). Realty sector leader today, sector +2%, data-centre optionality intact. Just barely positive — too early to trail. SL at 500 is round-number support and gives the trade room to breathe."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "-1.1%, CMP 369.65 vs SL 365 (1.3% buffer). Q4 results May 6 (~2 sessions away) — binary event. Per binary-event discipline, position already small (~5% of book), SL tight at -2.4% from entry capping tail. Choosing disposition (b) — let stored SL act as the tightened catastrophe cap into the print. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +10.3% to 52w high after Q4 PAT +156%. Print already consumed; intraday faded from 399 high to 380 — classic post-results exhaustion. Capital goods cluster already represented via HAL. Chasing a +10% move into a fade is the textbook bad entry. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gapped up to 10477 then sold off hard all day to 10078 — outside-day bearish reversal at 52w high. Q4 + buyback May 6 is binary. MARUTI already gives auto exposure (and is itself underwater). Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RRKABEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +6.83% but research flag: margin disappointment, brokers prefer Polycab/KEI, FMEG losses persist. Capital goods cluster already covered. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high 1851 with Q4 May 21 binary, Halol USFDA Import Alert overhang. Per Rule 13, governance overhang argues NO_ACTION on new entry. PHARMABEES already gives sector exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+88% YoY, Q4 pending May, MACD bearish crossover. Already extended; PHARMABEES covers sector. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RELIANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No deep data provided in this batch; cannot make informed decision. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in +4.5% gain; trail SL from 1025 to 1028 (1.2% below CMP)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 119 sits 2.6% below CMP — appropriate for macro hedge."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.85 already only 0.6% below CMP; no room to tighten."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "ATH break confirmed; trail SL 1710 → 1715, locking small gain while leaving structural room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Distribution day on volume but SL 1510 caps tail; Q4 May 14 binary acknowledged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 only 0.5% below CMP; cannot tighten without self-stopout risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 204 below today's low; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 4480 gives 1.3% room; defence thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just barely positive; SL 500 round-number support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 May 6 binary; SL 365 acts as pre-event catastrophe cap."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL and BAJAJ-AUTO showing classic post-news exhaustion (gap-up → fade) — would re-evaluate on a constructive consolidation 3-5 days later. SUNPHARMA could become actionable if Halol Import Alert is lifted before May 21. ADANIPORTS ATH break is the cleanest setup on the board today — already exposed.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 52% deployed with 10 active positions — well distributed across financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), defence/capex (HAL), auto (MARUTI), pharma (PHARMABEES), realty (ANANTRAJ), shipping (GESHIP), services (ADANIPORTS), industrials (EXIDEIND), macro hedge (GOLDBEES). Three names (GESHIP May 14, EXIDEIND May 6, BAJAJ-AUTO May 6 if added — declined) carry binary catalysts within 2 weeks; SLs already set as catastrophe caps. Today's tape (gap-up fades across BHEL/BAJAJ/MARUTI/GESHIP) signals sell-into-strength regime — correct stance is position management, not chasing. Two MODIFY actions today both pass the trail-gap and tighten-only tests. Cash buffer 48% provides ample headroom for any setup that survives the fade pattern."
}
